arts.ttl: Juventus’ Giuntoli: “Napoli are a well-oiled machine, we aim to be competitive Immediately”
arts.sum: Following Juventus’ Champions League victory against PSV, the team are gearing up for their Serie A clash with Napoli in the fifth round of fixtures. Prior to the match, Juventus’ Football Director Cristiano Giuntoli spoke to DAZN, sharing insights on the club’s current state and ambitions. Giuntoli began by acknowledging his colleague Giovanni Manna’s role in his transition to Juventus: “Giovanni introduced me to the Juventus world, and I’m very grateful to him for that.” Addressing the question of whether their transfer market activity was aimed at winning the Scudetto, Giuntoli offered a measured response: “Napoli has a well-established team. arts.ttl: Napoli’s Manna: “Juventus is an uphill battle. Conte? there’s mutual respect and trust”
arts.sum: As Napoli prepare to face Juventus in the fifth round of Serie A, the club’s sporting director Giovanni Manna spoke to DAZN before the match, addressing several key topics. Manna began by paying tribute to the recently departed Totò Schillaci, stating, “I believe it’s our duty to remember an important player like him.” Regarding the relationship with manager Antonio Conte and the team, Manna expressed optimism: “The coach and I have started a journey together, there’s mutual respect and trust.
